abilities.name: Aegis
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

abilities.name: Blinded by the Light
abilities.text: After this model suffers damage, it may drain a (soulstone) to make a Scheme marker in base contact with a friendly model within 8".

actions.name: Artefactor's Wrench
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action may target allies. If the target is an ally, instead of being dealt damage, the target heals 2.

triggers.name: MacGyvered
triggers.text: Once per activation. Enemy only. This model may remove a friendly Shadow Door marker within 1" of itself. If a marker was removed, draw a card from the top three cards of your discard pile. Otherwise, draw the top card of your discard pile.

actions.name: Gloom Burst
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Make a Shadow Door marker within range. Enemy models within (x)2" of the made marker must pass a TN 14 Sp duel or gain an Entranced token.

triggers.name: Nuclear Shadow
triggers.text: An ally within 2" of the made marker may declare a (melee) action.

triggers.name: Antiluminal Bridge
triggers.text: Once per activation. Choose another ally within 2" of this model. Place the chosen model in base contact with the made marker.

triggers.name: Mechanical Firefly
triggers.text: Make a Scheme marker in base contact with the made marker.
